reviewer.findings: C6 is infra-only, pre-existing and unrelated to the NTT crypto work (C1-C5): (a) pins explicit `version = "0.1.0"` on the two remaining unversioned local path deps in bebop2/delivery-domain/Cargo.toml -- dowiz-kernel and bebop-proto-cap -- matching their real Cargo.toml versions (both verified 0.1.0 by reading the source manifests, not assumed); a repo-wide grep confirms no other path dep is left unversioned. (b) ci-no-ungated-keygen.sh was rewritten to match the C3 gate attribute structurally (extract the #[cfg(any(...))] block preceding the fn, check required predicates as substrings) instead of one fixed-string line, so it tolerates the real gate's multi-line pretty-print and an extra ceremony predicate. Verified fresh: `bash scripts/ci-no-ungated-keygen.sh` exits 0, `bash scripts/ci-supply-chain.sh` exits 0 (advisories ok, bans ok, licenses ok, sources ok, cargo audit PASS, RED leg OK), and `cargo deny check bans` exits 0 standalone.

overlap.findings: Confirmed no crypto/production logic changed in this commit -- Cargo.lock diff is the expected re-resolution side effect of the version pins (adds criterion entries already declared as dev-deps but not previously locked). Confirmed this is kept as its own commit, separate from C1-C5, per the standing instruction to not mix infra/gate fixes with the crypto commit sequence.
